meta.title: slikaAI — AI photo recovery & editing
meta.description: Upload a photo, describe the change in plain words, and let AI transform or restore it.

hero.title: Rewrite any photo with a sentence.
hero.subtitle: Drop in an image, describe what you want changed — restore old prints, remove objects, or reinvent the scene. Powered by FLUX Kontext.

dropzone.headline: Drop a photo to begin
dropzone.hint: or click to browse — JPG, PNG or WebP, up to 20 MB
dropzone.tooLarge: That image is larger than 20 MB. Try a smaller file.
dropzone.wrongType: Please choose an image file (JPG, PNG or WebP).

modes.label: Edit mode
modes.wholeHint: Re-imagine the entire photo from your prompt
modes.brushHint: Paint over the exact spot you want to change

brush.instruction: Paint over the area you want to change, then describe the replacement.

prompt.label: Describe the change
prompt.placeholderWhole: e.g. restore this faded photo and bring back natural colors
prompt.placeholderBrush: e.g. replace this with a clear blue sky
prompt.needMask: Brush over an area to change first.

tools.title: Instant tools — in your browser
tools.note: No AI server needed. Runs locally & privately.
tools.needBrush: Switch to “Brush an area” and paint over the object first
tools.failed: In-browser processing failed. Your browser may not support WebGPU.

suggestions.label: Need ideas?
items: Remove the people in the background
Turn day into a golden sunset
Colorize this black and white photo
Make it look like a film photograph

errors.noKey: The image service isn't configured yet. Add your FAL_KEY to .env.local to enable editing.
errors.engineOffline: The local AI engine (ComfyUI) isn't running. Start the ComfyUI app, then try again. (The in-browser tools below work without it.)
errors.generic: Something went wrong while editing. Please try again.
errors.tooBig: The image is too large to process.

footer.built: Built with FLUX Kontext on fal.ai
footer.privacy: Your photos are sent securely for processing and are not stored by this app.
